overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a medieval fantasy town square at night, centered on an ornate stone fire structure with flickering flames. Two figures sit on the cobblestone ground beside the structure, illuminated by warm firelight against cool blue ambient lighting from surrounding lamps and drapery.

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a medieval town square at night, centered on an ornate stone fire structure with flickering flames. Heavy blue drapes frame the structure on either side, while two NPC figures sit on the cobblestone ground nearby. The warm firelight contrasts with the cool blue ambient lighting from a distant street lamp and the surrounding historic buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze upon a medieval town square where warm firelight clashes with a cool nocturnal atmosphere. It begins centered on an ornate stone fire structure, with flickering flames casting a golden glow across the cobblestone ground. As the eye takes in the surroundings, heavy blue drapes frame the central fire, while two figures sit quietly in the periphery of the light. The scene then expands to reveal the broader environment, where the warmth of the hearth contrasts with the deep blue ambient lighting emanating from a distant street lamp and the surrounding historic buildings.
